div1.entryFree: Mute, subst. one that is silent; a dumb spectator: are but --s or audience to this act, Hml. V, 2, 346. In Turkey a dumb officer acting as executioner: be you his eunuch, and your m. I'll be: when my tongue blabs, then let mine eyes not see, Tw. I, 2, 62. or else our grave, like Turkish m., shall have a tongueless mouth, H5 I, 2, 232. that thou wilt be a voluntary m. to my design, Cymb. III, 5, 158.
